metadata.title: ExampleCo Minimal System Security Plan
metadata.remarks: Synthetic public-safe SSP for the ExampleCo minimal corridor.

system-characteristics.description: Synthetic system boundary covering identity provider MFA settings, cloud audit logging, staff training records, and restore-test evidence expectations.

information-types.title: Synthetic compliance telemetry
information-types.description: Public-safe operational and documentary evidence used for OpenCompliance example artifacts.

authorization-boundary.description: Identity provider, cloud logging stack, and HR training record systems in the ExampleCo synthetic corridor.

network-architecture.description: Synthetic SaaS architecture boundary used only for public example fixtures.

data-flow.description: Evidence flows from an identity provider, a cloud platform, and an HR system into OpenCompliance typed claims.

components.title: ExampleCo control corridor
components.description: Synthetic corridor component representing the in-scope runtime and documentary boundary.

control-implementation.description: Synthetic implementation statements for the four controls in the minimal public corridor.

by-components.description: ExampleCo exports identity provider state showing MFA required and conditional access enabled for scoped administrative identities.
ExampleCo exports cloud configuration showing audit logging enabled and a retention period declared for the scoped production stack.
ExampleCo attaches a documentary training attestation signed by a named human actor.
ExampleCo has no typed restore-test export attached in the public example pack.
